name: InterCasino
raw_text:
We use Cookies to tailor your experience on our website and improve the services we provide to you. You can find out what Cookies we use and how to manage your Cookie preferences in our Cookie Policy.

Okay
Our casino bonuses

Everyone enjoys a good bonus, and we at InterCasino are no different. We’re proud to offer our players a wide variety of bonus options, starting with our Welcome Offer. When you play at InterCasino, you may also get the chance to enjoy Free Spins, Spin Credits, and more. We’ll provide you with all the information you need, but don’t forget to check the terms and conditions for each individual bonus you enjoy.

Many casinos have complicated bonus rules, but we prefer to get straight to the point and make life easier for everyone.

To start with, your cash and bonus balances will always be stored separately and marked clearly. Cash funds will always be used first when you play, but bonus funds can be seen as your second chance- it will come into play when you have no cash left.

You are always free to withdraw any cash in your account, however any remaining bonus balance will be forfeit if you do so. You may convert a bonus into cash by meeting its specific wagering requirements.

Feel free to take a look at our easy examples below for more information:
